content.introduction: Mega-cap companies significantly influence sector returns, but regulatory caps in ETFs limit exposure, creating a gap in sector representation. Investors may not fully benefit from sector performance due to these caps. BlackRock's TOPT ETF helps close this gap by better aligning mega-cap exposure with benchmarks.
body: # Mega-Cap Exposure: The Unsung Heroes of Sector Performance. Mega-cap companies drive sector returns, but traditional sector ETFs may not fully capture this exposure due to regulatory diversification caps. These caps limit exposure to the largest holdings, potentially affecting sector performance. ## Stay ahead of the market. Editorial Disclosure & AI Transparency: Ainvest News utilizes advanced Large Language Model (LLM) technology to synthesize and analyze real-time market data. Stock picking in the industrials, financials and communication services sectors contributed most to the fund's performance versus the mega-cap index for the six

*   [Investments](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/fine-tuning-megacaps-build-etfs). *   [Retirement](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/fine-tuning-megacaps-build-etfs). *   [Tools](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/fine-tuning-megacaps-build-etfs). *   [Resources](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/fine-tuning-megacaps-build-etfs). *   [About Us](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/fine-tuning-megacaps-build-etfs). *   [Advisors](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/fine-tuning-megacaps-build-etfs). *   [Our top investment strategies](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/investments/preparing-portfolios). *   [Invest for after-tax returns](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/tax-center). *   [Investment Directions](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/inside-the-market/investment-directions). *   [Portfolio manager views](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights#explore-markets-and-portfolio-articles). *   [My Portfolios](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/tools/my-portfolios). *   [Brand & marketing](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/resources/practice-management/advisor-marketing-strategies). For example, [TOPT](https://www.blackrock.com/us/individual/products/339779/ishares-top-20-u-s-stocks-etf) can close the mega-cap gap bringing exposures closer to benchmark, while [XOEF](https://www.blackrock.com/us/individual/products/344551/ishares-s-p-500-ex-s-p-100-etf) can help [reduce mega-cap and AI exposure](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/dont-abandon-tech). Closing the mega-cap gap with TOPT:**The average asset manager (AM) moderate model is less exposed to mega-cap stocks relative to broad benchmarks like the MSCI ACWI IMI (Fig.3).14 Adding the iShares Top 20 U.S. Stocks ETF ([TOPT](https://www.blackrock.com/us/individual/products/339779/ishares-top-20-us-stocks-etf)) could close an underweight to mega-cap stocks more efficiently by requiring a smaller portfolio allocation than an S&P 500 fund used for the same purpose. The chart illustrates market-cap breakdowns (Mega, Large, Mid & Small, plus TOPT or IVV allocations).](https://www.blackrock.com/blk-one01-c-assets/cache-1777566331000/images/media-bin/web/financial-professionals/topt.svg). ](https://www.blackrock.com/blk-one01-c-assets/cache-1777566331000/images/media-bin/web/financial-professionals/charts/down-exposure-to-mega-caps2.svg). *   [Our top investment strategies](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/investments/preparing-portfolios). *   [Invest for after-tax returns](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/tax-center). *   [Investment Directions](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights/inside-the-market/investment-directions). *   [Portfolio manager views](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/insights#explore-markets-and-portfolio-articles). *   [My Portfolios](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/tools/my-portfolios). *   [Brand & marketing](https://www.blackrock.com/us/financial-professionals/resources/practice-management/advisor-marketing-strategies).
